category_sources: Official GitHub README describes nerdlog as a remote-first multi-host TUI log viewer.
source_facts.description says it is a TUI log viewer with a timeline histogram.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and README use Nerdlog.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary usage documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the author's official project article.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/dimonomid/nerdlog; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes remote multi-host log viewing over ssh.
source_facts.description mentions TUI log viewing and no central server.
